CJ dos Santos.note: Cabo Verde's modern goalkeeper option, useful for short build-up and reaction saves.
CJ dos Santos.noteZh: CJ·多斯桑托斯是佛得角现代型门将选择，适合短传组织和反应扑救。

Dailon Livramento.note: Cabo Verde's mobile striker, dangerous when he bends runs behind and attacks loose balls.
Dailon Livramento.noteZh: 戴隆·利夫拉门托是佛得角机动中锋，弯线冲到身后并攻击松散球时很危险。

Deroy Duarte.note: Cabo Verde's central ball carrier, able to move possession through pressure and connect attacks.
Deroy Duarte.noteZh: 德罗伊·杜阿尔特是佛得角中路带球推进者，能在压力下推进控球并连接进攻。

Diney Borges.note: Cabo Verde's sturdy defensive piece, useful for aerial duels and covering central spaces.
Diney Borges.noteZh: 迪内·博尔热斯是佛得角稳固的防守棋子，适合空中对抗并覆盖中路空间。

Garry Rodrigues.note: Cabo Verde's experienced wide runner, still useful for direct carries into transition space.
Garry Rodrigues.noteZh: 加里·罗德里格斯是佛得角经验型边路跑动点，依然适合直接带球冲击转换空间。

Gilson Benchimol.note: Cabo Verde's bigger forward option, useful for holding service and attacking crosses.
Gilson Benchimol.noteZh: 吉尔森·本希莫尔是佛得角更高大的前锋选择，适合支住传球并冲击传中。

Helio Varela.note: Cabo Verde's explosive left-side threat, dangerous when he attacks a full-back and cuts service back.
Helio Varela.noteZh: 埃利奥·瓦雷拉是佛得角爆发型左路威胁，冲击边后卫并倒三角传球时很危险。

Jamiro Monteiro.note: Cabo Verde's midfield rhythm player, useful for calming possession and finding the first forward angle.
Jamiro Monteiro.noteZh: 贾米罗·蒙泰罗是佛得角中场节奏点，适合让控球冷静下来并找到第一条向前线路。

João Paulo.note: Cabo Verde's flexible midfield shield, able to cover defensive zones and support restarts.
João Paulo.noteZh: 若昂·保罗是佛得角灵活的中场屏障，能覆盖防守区域并支援定位球。

Jovane Cabral.note: Cabo Verde's flair winger, dangerous when he cuts inside and shoots before the block settles.
Jovane Cabral.noteZh: 若瓦内·卡布拉尔是佛得角灵感型边锋，内切并在防线站稳前射门时很危险。

Kelvin Pires.note: Cabo Verde's tall defensive cover, useful for aerial duels and protecting the middle.
Kelvin Pires.noteZh: 凯尔文·皮雷斯是佛得角高大防守保障，适合空中对抗并保护中路。

Kevin Pina.note: Cabo Verde's midfield anchor, useful for winning second balls and moving the next pass safely.
Kevin Pina.noteZh: 凯文·皮纳是佛得角中场锚点，适合赢下第二落点并安全送出下一脚传球。

Laros Duarte.note: Cabo Verde's combative midfield option, useful for duels and short, practical passing.
Laros Duarte.noteZh: 拉罗斯·杜阿尔特是佛得角对抗型中场选择，适合对抗和简洁实用的短传。

Logan Costa.note: Cabo Verde's athletic centre-back, important for defending space and starting attacks cleanly.
Logan Costa.noteZh: 洛根·科斯塔是佛得角运动能力强的中卫，对防守空间和干净发起进攻很重要。

Marcio Rosa.note: Cabo Verde's goalkeeper depth, bringing reflexes and calm cover behind Vozinha.
Marcio Rosa.noteZh: 马尔西奥·罗萨是佛得角门将深度，在沃齐尼亚身后提供反应和冷静保障。

Nuno da Costa.note: Cabo Verde's experienced forward connector, useful for linking play and attacking the channels.
Nuno da Costa.noteZh: 努诺·达科斯塔是佛得角经验型前场连接点，适合串联进攻并冲击通道。

Roberto Lopes.note: Cabo Verde's veteran centre-back, trusted for aerial duels and organizing deep defensive spells.
Roberto Lopes.noteZh: 罗伯托·洛佩斯是佛得角老将中卫，空中对抗和组织深位防守阶段都值得信任。

Ryan Mendes.note: Cabo Verde's veteran attacker, useful for timing runs and finding pockets near goal.
Ryan Mendes.noteZh: 瑞安·门德斯是佛得角老将攻击手，适合掌握跑动时机并在门前附近找到空间。

Sidny Lopes Cabral.note: Cabo Verde's left-sided defensive runner, useful for covering space and adding power at full-back.
Sidny Lopes Cabral.noteZh: 西德尼·洛佩斯·卡布拉尔是佛得角左侧防守跑动点，适合覆盖空间并给边后卫位置增加力量。

Steven Moreira.note: Cabo Verde's experienced right-back, steady in wide duels and useful supporting the attack.
Steven Moreira.noteZh: 史蒂文·莫雷拉是佛得角经验型右后卫，边路对抗稳健，也能支援进攻。

Stopira.summary: Stopira is a Cabo Verde centre-back from SC União Torreense who gives the national team veteran defending, left-footed balance, and set-piece toughness.
Stopira.note: Cabo Verde's veteran defensive organizer, useful for left-footed balance and set-piece battles.
Stopira.noteZh: 斯托皮拉是佛得角老将防守组织者，对左脚平衡和定位球对抗很有用。

Telmo Arcanjo.note: Cabo Verde's attacking connector, useful for final passes and set-piece service.
Telmo Arcanjo.noteZh: 特尔莫·阿尔坎若是佛得角进攻连接点，适合最后一传和定位球传递。

Vozinha.summary: Vozinha is a Cabo Verde goalkeeper from Chaves who gives the national team veteran command, shot stopping, and tournament experience.
Vozinha.note: Cabo Verde's veteran goalkeeper, trusted for leadership and saves in crowded penalty areas.
Vozinha.noteZh: 沃齐尼亚是佛得角老将门将，领导力和拥挤禁区中的扑救都值得信任。

Wagner Pina.note: Cabo Verde's energetic right-back, useful for overlaps and quick recovery runs.
Wagner Pina.noteZh: 瓦格纳·皮纳是佛得角活力右后卫，适合套边和快速回追跑动。

Willy Semedo.note: Cabo Verde's left-wing scorer, dangerous when he attacks inside and arrives near the far post.
Willy Semedo.noteZh: 威利·塞梅多是佛得角左路得分手，内切冲击并来到后点附近时很危险。

Yannick Semedo.note: Cabo Verde's central midfield worker, useful for pressing range and keeping possession tidy.
Yannick Semedo.noteZh: 扬尼克·塞梅多是佛得角中场工兵，适合覆盖压迫范围并让控球保持整洁。
